title: Comarostaphylis nochistlanensis
taxonomy: Comarostaphylis nochistlanensis is a plant species that belongs to the family Tetradylaceae. It is a part of the order Santalales and the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification places it in the subclass Dilleniidae and the division Magnoliophyta. The plant's classification is still being researched and updated.
